reviews.review_description:
Pretty fun game A few of my guys have been playing it Have a really good time for a yearly development game.Definitely worth trying.Especially at the price point
 Also , the developers really friendly Can't wait to get into myself
Game has tons of potential.  Bike feels authentic to ride. Can wait to see where this goes!!

reviews.review_title: Easy to learn, tough to master
reviews.review_description: I've tried several offroad, dirt-bike or pedal-bike type games and this one really does a good job of making you feel like you're actually riding an offroad motorcycle. The control scheme is intuitive as well as the shifting and breaking. Learning all of the various in-air tricks will take some time to master but it's still easy enough if you practice one a few times before moving on to the next. The comfort rating for the game is "intense" and that is definitely true! If you're not good with handling motion sickness, I would not recommend. I don't handle motion sickness very well but was able to go for small spurts before needing to pause. Though I would say the one track with all the bumps and grooves was really rough on my head and stomach (from the virtual bouncing)! But all this motion sickness is on me, not the game. That said, the gameplay is fun riding around and trying to do some epic jumps. You can tell it's still early access so I hope they're able to add AI and multiplayer competitors. The only other recommendation is that getting the bike into neutral seemed touchy.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback we will work upon the neutral , and soon coming up with quaterpipe challenge 32 ft and  career mode.

reviews.review_description: If you're looking for a dirt bike game with some realistic controls they got you covered or if you just wanna hit the gas and do stunts while catching air they got simplified controls for you as well. It's just fun to hop on and ride around at fast speeds

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the love and support! SXM is just getting started, and we have a lot of upcoming updates in the garage. Keep spreading the love and continue your Motocross experience with SXM!

reviews.review_description:
I was lucky enough to play an early version of this game and at every step the dev has improved the game and listened to feedback, 
Auto gears were added for noobs like me, the speed is insane, the jumps  are incredible.

More courses have been added 8 so far now with more to come, this is proving to be a great addition to my collection especially if you like fast speed games.

I’m still learning my jumps but just riding around is so realistic 
A definite must for fans of motorcycles mayhem.

developer_response.body: Hi GizmoDemi! Thank you so much for your review and positive feedback! This is just the beginning of the ride with SXM!  Positive feedback like this is what makes our work so satisfying! We are working on introducing new modes and updates sooner than expected!

reviews.review_title: A Hidden Gem for Motocross Fans
reviews.review_description:
This motocross VR game is a hidden gem in early access — extremely reasonably priced and packed with potential. The bike handling is impressively smooth and realistic, especially with the manual gear shifting that mirrors real-life riding. Navigating jumps and obstacles feels natural and satisfying.

There’s already a good variety of tracks and challenges, and it’s great to see both a demo and a free trial available. While the career mode and multiplayer are still in development, what’s already here shows real promise. A solid and exciting addition to the Meta Store library!

developer_response.body: Wow! This kind of love and support is what makes our job satisfying! We will surely live up to the community's expectations and deliver beyond career and multiplayer going forward ! Until then keep ripping SXM and thank you once again for your review!
Could you please tell us a bit more in detail as to what you found not ready? We would love to definitely work on that!

reviews.review_description: This game puts you on a Moto X stunt motorbike.  On Pro settings with realistic gears, for me too hard at the moment so playing with auto gears.  Really fast riding up and down the dirt mounds and high tracks with a combination of button presses the ability to do trick jumps.  I have mastered nothing apart from spectacular crashes, but with practice should get there.  Whilst still early release I am looking forward to where this game goes as it develops.

developer_response.body: Hi Magicmerlin007! Thank you so much for the positive feedback! You'll definitely get the hang of our hyper-realistic controls, and be well equipped for our Career mode when it launches! Let's just say it'll come sonner than expected! Until then keep ripping SXM!

reviews.review_description:
I don't even like racing games, or motorcycles, or pretty much anything that this game has in it most of the time.  But I tried the demo and had a blast, ended up buying the full game the next day.  This is going to be one of those "diamonds in the rough" games.  Its early access, so there are going to be plenty of improvements and features added down the road.  I bought it now in early access so that way I don't kick myself when the full release comes and its double the price or more.

I'm still figuring out some of the mechanics of the whole thing, I suck at using a manual transmission or whatever, but they have an "easy mode" for people who can't do two things at once.

Gameplay wise, you need some good VR legs, Although there are probably some comfort options in there somewhere.  I never mess with them.  I am always looking for some intense VR experiences that don't hold your hand and not afraid to spin you around a bit.

Sure there are improvements to make, but for this price, you can't beat it, and improvements will come.   Most of the time if I play a demo, I won't buy the full game, but I had hours of fun with just 3 tracks and the full game has twice that!  

Bring it devs!  I wanna go fast!

developer_response.body: We hear you and it's game on! We will be bringing in more modes and madness, and the speed isn't going to get any slower! Thank you so much for your review and love!
